codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 7054e37. The fix correctly addresses prior blocking failures: segment source/timestamp validation is now enforced in the curation engine, transcribe exits non-zero on any per-file failure, and curate now catches broader unmapped OpenAI SDK errors with user-facing messages. The previously reported transcription storage-key collision issue is also resolved in current code via path-hashed transcription keys. No new high-confidence blocking or non-blocking defects were identified in this fix.

summary: Pass. core-pipeline-scrutiny-fixes adequately resolves the prior blocking issues from curation-engine, cli-transcribe, and cli-curate, and current repository state confirms the earlier transcription-engine collision failure is fixed as well. No new high-confidence regressions were found.
